items.title: Cigna Boilermaker
items.content: <span data-teams="true">Cigna group number<span style="background-color: rgb(229, 241, 143);"> 3334628</span>.</span><div><span data-teams="true">It is extremely important that these are escalated immediately for payor update!<br><br><a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1768203936907?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">Reference</a><br></span></div>

items.title: ONN Remark Codes
items.content: <b>N864 -&nbsp;</b>This claim is subject to the No Surprises Act provisions that apply to emergency services.<div><a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773405602113?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">Link</a><br><br></div>

items.title: Postal FEP Pacific
items.content: For FEP Pacific Customer u<span data-teams="true">pdate to Blue Shield FEP if it has a initial 25 claim number, R policy, and California state.&nbsp;</span><div><br></div><div><div><span data-teams="true">Reference: <a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773336320971?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">Here. </a></span></div></div>

items.title: TRS / HEALTHSELECT
items.content: TRS/HEALTHSELECT showing as OOS may we process, TRS and HealthSelect are fully insured only in state of Texas. Example: Claim has TRS/HealthSelect Policy Number and the state is Oklahoma it is an OOS policy for NSA.<br><br><a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773843906989?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">Reference</a>

items.title: Ambetter and BAYLOR SCOTT claims
items.content: EOB Remark Codes surpasses the funding type; it is very important to go by how the EOB was processed (EXCEPT FOR AMBETTER AND BAYLOR &amp; SCOTT)<br><br><a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1774280496477?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">Reference</a>

items.title: FEP or FDERAL FEP
items.content: Do always make queries with the POC even if we have a instruction with the payor mapping team on how to identify the FEP claim.&nbsp;<div><br></div><div>&nbsp;<a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773153793247?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D" target="_blank">REFERENCE LINK</a></div>
